items.briefing:
Ransomware attacks are on the rise globally, with supply chain risks growing — a direct concern for Australian training organisations that rely on third-party software and services. Separately, Microsoft remains the most impersonated brand in phishing emails this quarter, meaning fake Microsoft login pages and emails are a common threat your staff may encounter. Russian hackers are also actively exploiting a vulnerability in Zimbra email software to steal emails without any user interaction, though current targets appear focused on the US and Ukraine.

Be cautious of any unexpected Microsoft-branded emails asking you to log in or verify your account — when in doubt, go directly to the official website rather than clicking any links.

featured.title: Origin Energy confirms customer data breach after unauthorised access
featured.quote: Major Australian energy provider's customer data breach directly affects millions of local residents and businesses.
